summary: Completed full backend + frontend testing of the new EON personal AI agent platform (/eon, /api/eon-app/*). 15/15 backend pytest cases pass and every frontend acceptance scenario from the review request passes end-to-end. Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM key responds for both /chat and /tasks/{id}/run.
critical_code_review_comments: eon_app.py: the unused `for m in history` block (lines 247-257) just `pass`es — dead code, can be removed for clarity.
eon_app.py is ~870 lines; if it keeps growing, consider splitting auth / threads / tasks into separate routers.

/api/eon-app/chat consumes a free-tier message but if the LLM call returns the fallback error string ('EON ran into a model error...'), it still decrements the user's quota. Consider not charging the user when the model errors.
EON_AGENTS roster is hard-coded in eon_app.py; fine for now but a config file or DB collection would let admins edit it without a deploy.
Frontend Eon.jsx is >1200 lines — split AgentView / DashboardView / TasksView / AuthGate into separate files to ease maintenance.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@jwoodtechnologies.com / 7607 (already documented in problem statement). Test users created by tests use fresh emails like eon-qa-<timestamp>@example.com / Test123!.
seed_data_creation: Backend test creates 2 throwaway users per run (eon-qa-<ts>@example.com and eon-chat-<ts>@example.com) plus a task that is deleted at the end. Frontend run creates one extra user (eon-qa-fe-<ts>) and one task that is left in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_eon_app.py uses module-scoped fixtures. Run: `pytest /app/backend/tests/test_eon_app.py -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/eon_results.xml`. The LLM-dependent tests (test_task_run_executes_via_llm, test_chat_replies_and_increments_count) take ~10-30s each; bump timeouts if Emergent gateway is slow. Frontend signup auto-sends the pending prompt — wait at least 5-10s after modal close before asserting on the AI reply bubble. The Tasks form's agent dropdown uses native <select> options with values [researcher|planner|writer|analyst].
verified_acceptance_criteria: GET /api/eon-app/agents → exactly 4 agents (Analyst, Planner, Researcher, Writer)
POST /api/eon-app/tasks + /tasks/{id}/run via Claude Sonnet 4.5 → non-empty result, status='done'
GET /api/eon-app/activity includes task_created / task_done / chat kinds
POST /api/eon-app/chat returns non-empty reply, increments message_count, 6th call returns 402 for non-admin
/eon splash shows 'EON' + 'Personal AI agent system' with NO 'Wood AI' / 'Hermes' anywhere
Dashboard shell + sidebar (Dashboard, Agent, Tasks, Wallet SOON, Market/News SOON) render without login
Guest can browse Dashboard / Agent freely
Type prompt → Send → AuthGate modal opens with 'Your prompt is saved: …' note
data-testid='eon-google-btn' present and click does not crash modal
After signup the AuthGate closes, lands on Agent view, AI reply for saved prompt arrives
Dashboard greets user by first_name after sign-in
Tasks view: create task with agent dropdown → click Run → 'done' status → eon-task-result-{id} block with non-empty AI text
Wallet and Market/News show 'Coming Soon' cards (data-testid eon-wallet / eon-news)
